figures.caption: Fig. 3: XY trajectory comparison on ellipse and lemniscate tracks. Ground truth (dashed black), OpenVINS VIO (orange), and our corrected localization (blue). Gray rectangles indicate the racing gates used as landmarks.
Fig. 1: Drone flight during A2RL competition. The racing drone is equipped with a monocular camera for visual-inertial odometry and gate detection.
